apps.author: florisboard
apps.name: FlorisBoard
apps.changeLog:
## What's Changed

### Theme changes
* Add default Material You themes by @lm41 in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3135
* Enable arbitrary material you colors by @lm41 in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3145
* Fix incorrect font size for uri popup by @lm41 in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3150

> [!NOTE]
> Theme authors have to implement the fix for uri popups themselves as this property is controlled by the theme. If you want an example on how to do this please have a look at the linked PR. 

### Clipboard history changes
* Clipboard history rework by @patrickgold in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3107
  * See the linked PR for detailed changes in the clipboard

### New features
* Add SwipeAction.SWITCH_TO_MEDIA_CONTEXT by @lm41 in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3143
* Add 'Hide Keyboard' action by @quycao in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3132

### Bug fixes
* Properly recalculate SurfaceView size by @lm41 in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/commit/666ce6227522f855eea22f31e8aa39abbfbfe68b
* Use different icon for paste action by @lm41 in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3106
* Fix wrong pref migration for clipboard sync by @lm41 in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3149
* Add uppercase letters to email regex by @klaurence in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3110

### New/Updated layouts
* Adding Korean Phonetic layout  by @Shunnuo in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3079
* Add Georgian Standard keyboard layout by @necioerrante in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3141

### Development changes
* Raise `targetSdk` to 36
* Raise `compileSdk` to 36

## New Contributors
* @Shunnuo made their first contribution in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3079
* @quycao made their first contribution in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3132
* @necioerrante made their first contribution in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3141

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/compare/v0.5.1...v0.5.2

apps.author: cogwheel0
apps.name: Conduit
apps.changeLog:
- Improved chat streaming smoothness, markdown rendering performance, and loading skeletons.
- Refined chat scrolling, keyboard anchoring, and pin-to-top behavior.
- Fixed iOS voice input audio routing and speech recognizer recovery.
- Fixed self-signed/mTLS image loading and Android home widget dependency resolution.
- Improved terminal tab lifecycle handling and sidebar layout polish.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cogwheel0/conduit/compare/v3.1.0...v3.1.1

apps.author: localsend
apps.name: LocalSend
apps.changeLog:
### Summary

A small interim release before WebRTC is stable (https://github.com/localsend/localsend/pull/2204)

- feat: add advanced setting to filter network interfaces (@Tienisto)
- feat(mobile): swipe gesture to select multiple media files (@Tienisto)
- feat(windows): when pasting an image, automatically convert it to PNG (@BrianMwit)
- feat(android): add option to open gallery when image/video was automatically saved (@Tienisto)
- fix: path traversal vulnerability when saving files (@Tienisto)
- fix: black screen when tapping on "Back" twice in "Share via link" (@Tienisto)
- fix(macos): window disappears on command key when minimize to tray is enabled (@Tienisto)
- fix(windows): do not poll local IP resulting in unwanted location permissions (@Tienisto)

[Full Changelog](https://github.com/localsend/localsend/blob/main/app/assets/CHANGELOG.md)

## What's Changed
* feat: handle crashes gracefully by @tvillega in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/611
* feat: add Starred bundle for Android Auto by @MaFo-28 in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/614
* fix: quick actions visibility state not checked by @tvillega in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/621
* chore(i18n): Update Polish translation by @skajmer in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/626
* feat: Implement a sleep timer button to the currently playing screen by @CtznSniiips in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/617
* Refactor: Custom Commands for degoogled and Tempus flavors by @MaFo-28 in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/641
* Playlist pinned sorting by @eddyizm in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/642
* feat: add lyrics to player quick actions by @tvillega in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/622
* chore(i18n): Update Spanish (Spain, es-ES) translation by @jaime-grj in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/623
* style: Add pure black/AMOLED theme by @jaime-grj in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/630
* style: Adjust text margin in "Discover" section elements by @jaime-grj in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/628
* feat: save radio list locally for offline access by @pLum0 in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/631
* Refactor: extract setDownloadViewModel() to reduce code duplication by @REDGROUL in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/635
* Feat: remove Android Auto settings in degoogled flavor by @MaFo-28 in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/637
* Limiting number of tracks in playlists on Android Auto by @MaFo-28 in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/638
* Refactor: extract enqueueMix() to reduce code duplication in AA's MadeForYouBuilder by @MaFo-28 in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/640
* fix: equalizer glitching navigation by @tvillega in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/643
* feat: add settings for track number display by @tvillega in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/647
* feat: add landscape layout to crash activity by @tvillega in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/648
* fix: don't reload media source if we can already seek to the desired position by @OlivierGenez in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/651
* chore: removed createUrl() log statement by @eddyizm in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/652
* fix: npe if playlist playback happens before data fetching is done by @tvillega in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/690

## New Contributors
* @pLum0 made their first contribution in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/631
* @REDGROUL made their first contribution in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/635
* @OlivierGenez made their first contribution in https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/pull/651

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/eddyizm/tempus/compare/v4.16.0...v4.17.0

apps.author: termux
apps.name: Termux
apps.changeLog:
## v0.118.3 - 2025-05-22 10:47

**Commit history:** [`v0.118.2...v0.118.3`](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/compare/21c0d51f...v0.118.3)

<details>
<summary>Changelog</summary>

### Changed

- **!** Remove `TERMUX_APP__BUILD_DATA_DIR` as a different naming scheme will be used for build variables and rename `TERMUX__ROOTFS` to `TERMUX__ROOTFS_DIR`. ([`849e6b10`](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/commit/849e6b10))

##  

 



### Fixed

- Bump `org.lsposed.hiddenapibypass:hiddenapibypass` to `6.1` to fix crash on Android 16 QPR1. Related commit https://github.com/LSPosed/AndroidHiddenApiBypass/commit/9efadf06. Related commit https://android-review.googlesource.com/c/platform/libcore/+/3380841. Related commit https://cs.android.com/android/_/android/platform/libcore/+/0dc31afe. Closes [#4556](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/issues/4556). ([`fda17afa`](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/commit/fda17afa))  

- Declare `MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` as it being added in Termux:API version `0.51.0` is revoking the storage permission of Termux app after updates and sometimes later. Related issue [#4486](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/issues/4486). ([`23756528`](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/commit/23756528))  

- Add explicit `serialVersionUID` to `Serializable` classes like `ReportInfo` and `TextIOInfo`. Reading `ReportInfo` with `Bundle.getSerializable()` by `ReportActivity` is triggering exception when default algorithm is used for `serialVersionUID` in Termux:API plugin app when error notification created in `ResultReturner.returnData()` by `TermuxPluginUtils.sendPluginCommandErrorNotification()` is clicked. Related issue https://github.com/termux/termux-api/issues/762. ([`4f033b34`](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/commit/4f033b34))  

---

 

</details>

apps.author: DavidVentura
apps.name: Translator
apps.changeLog:
This is a reproducibility fix for 0.6.0

---


OCR:
- Massively improved OCR capabilities; go to 'manage languages' to update the models
- Implemented "live camera translation"
- Add button to see original image after OCR

Misc:
- Sped up Kokoro TTS voices ~3x; download the faster Kokoro voice in 'manage languages'
- Add a 'How to use' screen
- Fix System TTS feature not respecting chosen voice/playback rate

apps.author: bitfireAT
apps.name: DAVx⁵
apps.changeLog:
**See also the [announcement on Mastodon](https://fosstodon.org/@davx5app/116590691183513080)!**

>[!NOTE]
>We unfortunately [had to change the content provider name for the DAVx⁵ WebDAV provider](https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2201) because **Google Play didn't allow us to upload updates with the old name anymore** (probably because of a Google Play bug, they say they'll fix it at some time). As a consequence:

1. If you use a DAVx⁵ WebDAV mount in another app (like Total Commander), the old mount in the other app will stop working and you'll have to add the mount again. No changes in DAVx⁵ needed.
2. It seems that there are unexpected problems with Seedvault because it contains the hardcoded old authority name in an allow list. Please see the [discussion thread](https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/discussions/2233) and https://github.com/seedvault-app/seedvault/issues/1014 for more information.

<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v4.5.12-ose -->

## What's Changed
### Refactoring
* Rename NOTIFY_LICENSE to more generic NOTIFY_VALIDATION by @sunkup in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2115
* Split SyncValidator by @sunkup in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2138
* Separate Push distributor management and Push subscription management by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2157
* Update DmfsTask import path in task-related classes by @sunkup in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2192
* Run `ShortcutManager.setDynamicShortcuts` on IO dispatcher by @ArnyminerZ in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2197
* Fix various compile warnings by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2204
* `LocalAddressBook`: take `groupMethod` as argument by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2213
### Dependencies
* Bump the app-dependencies group with 8 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2064
* Bump the app-dependencies group with 8 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2080
* PushRegistrationManager: fix repeated sending of requests by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2082
* Bump gradle-wrapper from 9.4.0 to 9.4.1 in the app-dependencies group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2093
* [CI] Bump gradle/actions from 5 to 6 in the ci-actions group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2109
* Bump the app-dependencies group with 8 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2110
* Bump the app-dependencies group with 2 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2129
* Bump the app-dependencies group with 4 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2136
* [CI] Bump softprops/action-gh-release from 2 to 3 in the ci-actions group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2135
* Bump com.google.guava:guava from 33.5.0-android to 33.6.0-android in the app-dependencies group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2147
* Bump the app-dependencies group with 11 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2163
* Bump the app-dependencies group with 3 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2182
* Bump the app-dependencies group with 7 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2208
### Other changes
* Update ContactSyncManager to use IoDispatcher for I/O operations by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2066
* Add SUPPORT.md file by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2078
* Update README with improved content and formatting by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2081
* Fix PushRegistrationManager VAPID key check by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2088
* Add commented includeBuild configurations for debugging by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2096
* Remove dead code for jCard contact processing by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2079
* Enable lenient JSON parsing for improved compatibility by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2098
* Make lenientJson parser/serializer gc-able by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2101
* Fix pager state recreation on page count change by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2103
* AppTheme: fallback to OSE theme when Hilt Application is unavailable by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2102
* Derive debug info and WebDAV provider component names from package name  by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2111
* Add gradle-daemon-jvm.properties and sync Java version by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2119
* Translations update from Hosted Weblate by @weblate in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2121
* Show number of (un)synced items in collection properties by @ArnyminerZ in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2114
* Add support for `preconfigurationUrl` by @ArnyminerZ in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2122
* Update CI label from "github_actions" to "ci-cd"; use build cache for prereleases by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2128
* AccountSettingsScreen: use dividers like in app settings by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2131
* CollectionScreen: improve local item counting by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2124
* Provide login validation for app variants by @sunkup in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2125
* ExternalUris: add DAVx5 Select info page path constant by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2139
* Translations update from Hosted Weblate by @weblate in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2140
* Add "Keep Android Open" dismissible action card by @sunkup in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2132
* Use auto-sizing text for intro slogan by @sunkup in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2146
* Bind push distributor expiration to endpoint by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2154
* Mention issue-before-PR in CONTRIBUTING.md and PR template by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2158
* Add initial AGENTS.md for code reviews by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2160
* Bump version to 4.5.12-beta.1 and update Copilot instructions by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2162
* Push settings screen: Minimum functionality by @sunkup in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2167
* Update compile SDK to 37 and AGP 9.x compatibility by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2177
* Push Settings: Add action card to set default UnifiedPush distributor by @sunkup in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2175
* Push Settings: Add push capability info card by @sunkup in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2178
* Update synctools to a version that uses ical4j 4.x by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2087
* Push settings screen: Reload on package changes by @sunkup in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2181
* Update synctools to fix R8 rules for release builds by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2191
* Rename ViewModels to `...ViewModel` suffix by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2187
* [Push] Integrate new Push settings screen by @cketti in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2186
* Change debug info/WebDAV authority names to work around Google Play bug by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2201
* Translations update from Hosted Weblate by @weblate in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2202
* [Push] Update registration worker to actively select distributor by @ArnyminerZ in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2166
* Enable Kotlin annotation default target and clean up DI annotations by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2203
* Switch Kotlin annotation default target to `param-property` for core, too by @rfc2822 in https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/pull/2212


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/bitfireAT/davx5-ose/compare/v4.5.10-ose...v4.5.12-ose

apps.changeLog:

* Update reactivecircus/android-emulator-runner action to v2.36.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6569

* Update androidx.compose.* by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6570
* Update com.android.* by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6548
* Update Gradle to v9.4.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6551

* Catch WebView error while instantiating with a proper error by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6532
* Update ruby/setup-ruby action to v1.293.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6580

* Enable auto close Assist after 30seconds of inactivity by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6506
* Update androidx.* by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6529

* Update screenshot tests by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6584
* Use broadcast instead of startService to send command by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6537
* Update softprops/action-gh-release action to v2.6.1 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6591
* Introduce FailFastExtension/Rule to reset handler by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6586
* Handle WebView permissions with the PermissionManager by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6466
* Adjust WebsocketManager check to avoid location usage by @jpelgrom in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6577

* Update org.jetbrains.kotlin.* to v2.3.20 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6592

* Update androidx.* to v1.9.3 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6596

* Move away from Main in Widgets by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6415

* Introduce HADropdownMenu by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6528
* Show snackbar with troubleshooting link for Matter/Thread non-OK activity results by @jpelgrom in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6614
* Make draft release to upload files and promote right after by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6616
* Bump changelog_master.xml for weekly release 2026.3.7 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6617
* Update github/codeql-action action to v4.34.1 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6620
* Fix race condition with coil RemoteViewsTarget by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6627
* Fix LocationTrackingViewModel leak via Room InvalidationTracker by @loganrosen in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6612
* Remove RemoteViewsTarget by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6629
* Remove unwanted ioScope (that is main) from WebViewActivity by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6632
* Update ruby/setup-ruby action to v1.296.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6650
* Update androidx.* by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6644
* Bump changelog_master.xml for weekly release 2026.3.8 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6649
* Update dependency com.google.protobuf:protobuf-javalite to v3.25.9 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6647
* Update dependency io.sentry:sentry-android-core to v8.37.1 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6642
* Update androidx.compose.* by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6646
* Update wear.compose to v1.6.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6645
* Only unregister actionReceiver when it was registered by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6628
* Use okhttp when mtls setup by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6630
* Update github/codeql-action action to v4.35.1 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6656
* Update androidx.* to v1.10.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6655
* Better guard against invalid 'mdi' in entity icon by @jpelgrom in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6660
* Update ruby/setup-ruby action to v1.299.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6661
* Make sure the camera bitmap is not going above the memory limit by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6658
* Go async for TileReceiver on the watch by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6541
* Use Lokalise action and async download by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6659
* Try to get proper filename when downloading blob by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6631
* Fix bottom sheet peek-to-expanded jump on show by @loganrosen in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6648
* Wear: use coroutines from GMS tasks by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6638
* Remove usage of 'runBlocking' from 'SettingsActivity' by @loganrosen in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/5920
* Remove hardware limitation for wake word detection by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6625
* Avoid using AssistVoiceInteractionSessionService as recognitionService by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6639
* Bump changelog_master.xml for weekly release 2026.4.1 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6665
* Bump changelog_master.xml for weekly release 2026.4.2 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6667
* Bring back strings.zip by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6668
* Only store strings.zip as artifact in PR workflow by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6669
* Bump changelog_master.xml for weekly release 2026.4.3 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6674
* Add haptic message support for FrontendScreen by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6635
* Replace 'custom component' with 'community integration' by @NoRi2909 in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6679
* Skip car intent for car_ui notifications on non-Automotive minimal flavor by @jpelgrom in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6677
* Make sure to use repository English translation instead of Lokalise by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6681
* Use HapticFeedbackPerformer in WebViewActivity by @jpelgrom in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6683
* Update plugin dev.panuszewski.typesafe-conventions to v0.10.1 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6682
* Bump addressable from 2.8.8 to 2.9.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6685
* Update ruby/setup-ruby action to v1.300.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6693
* Filter out messages not coming from the frontend external bus by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6680
* Update aboutlibraries to v14.0.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6692
* Update wear.compose to v1.6.1 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6696
* Add check licenses job by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6670
* Update actions/github-script action to v9 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6703
* Bump changelog_master.xml for weekly release 2026.4.4 by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6698
* Update lokalise/lokalise-pull-action action to v5.1.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6691
* Update aboutlibraries to v14.0.1 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6699
* Update dependency com.google.firebase:firebase-bom to v34.12.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6700
* Update dependency io.sentry:sentry-android-core to v8.38.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6695
* Update dependency org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-serialization-json to v1.11.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6702
* Update internal URL input inputType to match main/external URL input by @jpelgrom in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6697
* UrlFlow and errorFlow are initialized with the state value and eagerly started by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6688
* Prevent app reload on dark/light theme toggle by @loganrosen in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6701
* FrontendScreen filter out messages not coming from the frontend external bus by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6687
* Update actions/upload-artifact action to v7.0.1 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6706
* Revert 'Replace 'custom component' with 'community integration'' by @thecode in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6707
* Reinstate last set of pre-existing health connect sensors by @dshokouhi in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6588
* Don't set Cookie header for DownloadManager if null by @jpelgrom in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6709
* Update softprops/action-gh-release action to v3 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6712
* Add frontend download capabilities to FrontendScreen and rework permissions by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6708
* Define CommandMessage pattern and implement first messages by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6640
* Introduce WebViewAction and enforce EvaluateScriptUsage by @TimoPtr in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6713
* Update github/codeql-action action to v4.35.2 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6728

## New Contributors
* @thecode made their first contribution in https://github.com/home-assistant/android/pull/6707
